name: Immunohistochemistry on Paraffin Sections (IHC-P)

note.en: 4–5 µm FFPE on positively charged slides (Superfrost Plus). Ensures adhesion & melts paraffin.
note.zh: 4–5 µm FFPE 切片贴附于正电荷载玻片（Superfrost Plus）。确保贴附并熔化石蜡。

components.name: 2. Deparaffinize: 3 × 5 min xylene → rehydrate: 100% EtOH × 2 → 95% → 70% → ddH₂O × 2

note.en: Each step 5 min. Fume hood for xylene.
note.zh: 每步 5 min。二甲苯需在通风橱操作。

note.en: Citrate pH 6.0 (citrate_buffer_ar): most cytoplasmic/ER antigens. EDTA pH 9.0 (ar_edta_ph9): nuclear/membrane antigens. Pressure cooker (15 psi, 3–4 min) or water bath (98°C, 20 min). Cool 20 min RT.
note.zh: 柠檬酸 pH 6.0（citrate_buffer_ar）：多数胞质/内质网抗原。EDTA pH 9.0（ar_edta_ph9）：核/膜抗原。高压锅（15 psi，3–4 min）或水浴（98°C，20 min）。RT 冷却 20 min。

components.name: 4. Block endogenous peroxidase: 3% H₂O₂ in PBS, 10–15 min RT

note.en: Prevents background from blood/liver peroxidases. Rinse 3× PBS.
note.zh: 防止血液/肝脏内源性过氧化物酶背景。PBS 冲洗 3 次。

components.name: 5. Block: 5–10% normal serum (same species as secondary Ab) in TBS, 1 h RT

note.en: Do NOT wash after — aspirate excess, apply primary Ab directly. Optional: avidin/biotin block if using ABC system.
note.zh: 封闭后不洗——吸去多余血清直接加一抗。ABC 系统需先做 avidin/biotin 封闭。

components.name: 6. Primary Ab: diluted in TBS + 1% BSA; 1 h RT or 4°C overnight (humidity chamber)

note.en: Typical 1:100–1:1000. PAP pen barrier. 4°C overnight often gives better S/N.
note.zh: 通常 1:100–1:1000 稀释。PAP 笔画疏水圈。4°C 过夜通常信噪比更好。

note.en: Polymer-based (EnVision+, Dako) preferred over biotin-streptavidin (less background). Species-matched.
note.zh: 聚合物法（EnVision+，Dako）优于生物素-链霉亲和素（更低背景）。种属匹配。

components.name: 10. DAB development: apply DAB + H₂O₂, 2–10 min RT; monitor under microscope; stop in ddH₂O

note.en: Brown = positive signal. Do not over-develop. Fresh DAB only.
note.zh: 棕色 = 阳性信号。勿过度显色。DAB 需新鲜配制。

components.name: 11. Counterstain: Hematoxylin 1–5 min → differentiate in acid-alcohol → blue in running water 5 min

note.en: Harris or Mayer's Hematoxylin. Blue in tap water or Scott's Water (2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L).
note.zh: Harris 或 Mayer 苏木精。自来水返蓝或 Scott's 水（2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L）。

note.en: Each 2–5 min. Avoid air bubbles. Cure 24 h before imaging.
note.zh: 每步 2–5 min。避免气泡。封片后 24 h 再镜检。

notes.en: Controls: (1) positive tissue; (2) isotype control replacing primary Ab; (3) H&E on sequential section. Scoring: H-score = intensity(0–3) × %positive. Quantitative: QuPath/HALO software. For multiplex: Opal tyramide system (TSA amplification).
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 阳性组织；(2) 同型对照替代一抗；(3) 相邻切片 H&E。评分：H-score = 强度(0–3) × 阳性率。定量：QuPath/HALO 图像分析。多重免疫组化：Opal tyramide 系统（TSA 信号放大）。

ref: Ramos-Vara & Miller (2014) Vet Pathol 51:42–87; Taylor & Rudbeck (2013) Dako Education Guide; Shi et al. (1991) J Histochem Cytochem 39:741
